hypothesis: A multimodal MOF model that jointly encodes MOFid textual prompts, SMILES/linker information, and a lightweight 3D structural graph during continual pre-training will achieve at least a 10% relative reduction in MAE on QMOF and hMOF test sets when fine-tuned with ≤5K SFT samples, compared to the best text-only continual pre-trained MOF LLM.
